description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a dark green body and a black, ribbed, hinged lid. The lid is split into two sections, each with a series of raised ridges for structural strength and grip. The body of the dumpster features reinforced horizontal bands and slightly beveled edges, giving it a robust, industrial appearance. On each side, there are large, rectangular recessed handles made of metal, designed for mechanical lifting or manual maneuvering. The surface shows signs of wear, with scuff marks and slight discoloration, typical of dumpsters used in urban environments. The base is elevated slightly off the ground, likely to facilitate forklift or truck access.
description: A large, green metal dumpster with a black, ribbed, split lid and reinforced sides, featuring recessed metal handles and visible wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split black lid and reinforced green body, with the lid closed and no handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped, ribbed lid and a large, rectangular recessed metal handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat green back panel and the full width of the dumpster, with no handles or lid details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the sloped lid and another recessed metal handle.
attribute_lid_type: split, hinged, ribbed plastic lid with two sections; no visible locking mechanism
attribute_handle_design: two large, rectangular recessed metal handles on each side
